name: 腾讯自选股
description: 提供实时行情，支持条件选股、自选管理、股价提醒与模拟交易。
description_zh: 直连腾讯自选股，实时掌握毫秒级行情与资金动态，用自然语言分析自选数据、设置股价提醒、管理模拟交易，轻松搞定盯盘与投资决策。
description_en: Directly connect to WeStock for real-time market data, watchlist management, price alerts, and paper trading. Analyze personalized data with natural language and easily handle monitoring and investment decisions.
examples_zh: 把宁德时代加到我的自选
帮我找半导体相关的股票
看看我有哪些自选股票
查一下腾讯控股的资金流向
茅台和宁德时代今天行情怎么样
帮我看看贵州茅台近3个月的日K线走势
查一下比亚迪最新的财务报表
今天MACD金叉信号的股票有哪些
帮我买入200股寒武纪做模拟交易
看看我的模拟交易账户还剩多少可用资金
我的模拟交易最近盈亏怎么样
贵州茅台涨到1300元时提醒我
宁德时代跌破300元帮我发个提醒
腾讯控股日涨幅超过5%时提醒我
examples_en: What stocks are in my watchlist
Check capital flow for Tencent Holdings
How are Moutai and CATL doing today
Show me Moutai's daily K-line trend for the past 3 months
Find A-shares with high ROE and low valuation
Which stocks have MACD golden cross signals today
Paper trade buy 200 shares of Cambricon for me
How much available cash is left in my paper trading account
How is my recent paper trading profit and loss
Alert me when Kweichow Moutai rises to 1300 yuan
Send me an alert when CATL drops below 300 yuan
Alert me when Tencent Holdings' daily gain exceeds 5%
